title: The 3BaaDi Anomaly
description: This mod was built specifically for 3BaaDi. It features custom lore from Arab Miners Season 6, personal challenges, and a story that only a true 'Azizi Al-Mutabi' can solve.
body:
# 🔦 The 3BaaDi Anomaly
"خليك معنا يا عزيزي المتابع... للأبد."
The 3BaaDi Anomaly is a high-quality, psychological horror mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1. Dedicated to the legendary YouTuber 3BaaDi, this mod twists nostalgia into a nightmare. You are no longer just a viewer; you are the subject of a corrupted broadcast.
Something is watching you from the fog. It wears a familiar yellow hoodie, but those eyes... those eyes aren't human.
## 👻 The Entities
- The Anomaly: A persistent stalker that watches you from a distance. It doesn't always attack; sometimes it just wants to make sure you know it's there.
- The Speed Decoy: A ghost of the past. If you see your old friend "Speed" in the fog, do not approach. He is merely a vessel for something much worse.
- Transformed 3BaaDi: The true form of the nightmare. Faster, stronger, and relentless. When the "human" mask falls off, your only choice is to run.
## 📺 The ArtMiners S6 Nightmare (Custom Dimension)
Discover the Old Computer in the Overworld for a 40% chance to be pulled into a "Glitch into the Past."
You will find yourself in a corrupted, void-replica of the ArtMiners Season 6 server. Locked in permanent midnight under a sickly yellow fog, you must face your own history:
- The Cursed Glass Shop: Revisit the shop from Episode 21. Take your profit (the diamond), but be prepared for the sound of shattering glass and the arrival of the Anomaly.
- The Dirt House Trap: Think you’re safe in a simple dirt shack? The viewers are watching, and they won't let you sleep.
- Psychological Scares: Experience fake chat messages from Speed and Faisal, phantom TNT ignitions, and lightning strikes that follow your every move.

## 📸 Items & Tools
- Flash Camera: Your only defense. A high-powered flash can temporarily stun and reveal the Anomaly. Use it wisely; your battery is limited.
- Cursed Silver Play Button: A haunted relic of 10 million subscribers. Keeping it in your inventory causes the world—and the animals in it—to act very... strangely.
- Corrupted Hard Drives: The key to your escape. Find all three hidden within the S6 Dimension to power up the terminal and return home.
- The ArtMiners Diaries: A hand-written book left by a "Ghost of Speed" that contains the riddles needed to survive the nightmare.
## 🛠️ Features
- GeckoLib Animations: Fluid, terrifying movements for all custom entities.
- Custom Soundscape: Distorted voice lines, heartbeats, and 3D positional audio.
- Progression System: Custom advancements like "Found Footage" and "Smile for the Flash" to guide your journey.
- Dedicated Creative Tab: All items, blocks, and spawn eggs are neatly organized in a custom "3BaaDi Anomaly" tab.
## 📋 Requirements & Installation
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Mod Loader: Forge
Required Dependency: GeckoLib (Mod will crash without this!)
## 💡 A Special Message to 3BaaDi
عبادي، هذا المود صمم خصيصاً لك وللمتابعين (عزيزي المتابع). فيه تفاصيل من تاريخك في أرت ماينرز ومواقفك مع سبيد وفيصل. ننتظر نشوفك تواجه الوحش اللي صنعناه من ذكرياتك!
